text.title: DORA Metrics Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end with decision gates.

step.name: decide-apply-vs-skip
step.action: Decision tree on pipeline maturity + buy-in.
step.decision-gate: If decision != apply, STOP and document `skip-this-methodology` rationale.

step.name: pin-sources
step.action: Map every metric to one source.

step.name: build-dashboard
step.action: Build Grafana / Datadog dashboard with all 5.

step.name: schedule-review-validate
step.action: Set quarterly review; run validator; commit.
step.decision-gate: If validator exits non-zero, return to the previous draft step and fix violations.
